task: 构建一个 INI 配置文件解析器，支持 section、key=value 解析、注释忽略、以及序列化回 INI 格式

features.name: Section Header Parsing
features.prompt: Implement parseSection function that extracts section names from INI section headers. The function should: (1) Match lines in format [sectionName], (2) Trim whitespace from the line and inside brackets, (3) Return null for empty brackets [], malformed headers like [unclosed or unopened], and non-section lines, (4) Support section names with dots, dashes, and underscores.

features.name: Key-Value Pair Parsing
features.prompt: Implement parseKeyValue function that extracts key-value pairs from INI lines. The function should: (1) Split on first '=' only (values can contain '='), (2) Trim whitespace from both key and value, (3) Return null if no '=' found or if key is empty, (4) Handle empty values (key=), (5) Handle quoted values by stripping matching single or double quotes from start and end.

features.name: Comment Detection
features.prompt: Implement isComment function that identifies comment lines. The function should: (1) Return true for lines starting with ';' or '#' (after trimming leading whitespace), (2) Return false for empty strings and whitespace-only lines, (3) Return false for lines where ';' or '#' appears mid-line (inline comments not supported).

features.name: Full INI Parsing
features.prompt: Implement parseIni function that parses complete INI content into IniData structure. The function should: (1) Split content by newlines (handle both LF and CRLF), (2) Track current section (empty string '' for global/no section), (3) Skip empty lines and comments using isComment, (4) Use parseSection to detect section changes, (5) Use parseKeyValue to extract key-value pairs, (6) Store pairs in current section object, (7) Handle duplicate keys (last value wins), (8) Return empty object for empty/whitespace-only input.

features.name: INI Serialization
features.prompt: Implement serializeIni function that converts IniData back to INI format string. The function should: (1) Output global section (key '') first without section header, (2) Output each named section with [sectionName] header, (3) Output each key=value pair on its own line, (4) End each section (including last) with newline, (5) Return empty string for empty data object, (6) Preserve values with special characters as-is (no escaping needed).

features.name: Roundtrip Consistency
features.prompt: This is a validation feature - no new functions needed. Ensure that parseIni and serializeIni work together correctly: parsing INI content, serializing it back, and re-parsing should produce identical IniData objects. This validates the consistency between parser and serializer.
